name: era-cloud
description: Unified control plane for compute, inference, and server capacity across multiple providers.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @era/common && npm run build --workspace @era/api && npm run build --workspace @era/web
scripts.deploy:api: npm run build --workspace @era/common && npm run build --workspace @era/api
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build --workspace @era/common && npm run build --workspace @era/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @era/common && npm run typecheck --workspace @era/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @era/web
